message:
bd-2wds9: Verify distributed/recovery.rs audit (SOUND)

Stale agent a9d0ad3 flagged CRITICAL and HIGH severity issues.

Verification: ALL FALSE POSITIVE

1. CRITICAL (cancelled state ignored): FALSE POSITIVE
   - Line 620 DOES check `if self.cancelled` and returns error

2. HIGH (missing state reset): FALSE POSITIVE
   - All error paths properly reset `self.recovering = false`
   - Lines 637-640, 645-647, 652-656, 668 all handle this
   - Agent simply misread the code

3. HIGH (+100 ESI threshold): DESIGN CHOICE
   - Defensive buffer for repair symbols, standard protocol practice

Agent error rate very high on this module - none of the claimed
bugs actually exist in the code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
